title: Search for duplicates and create an update
excerpt: I have a board that I am using to track new applicants for job postings. I want to create an update for applicants who applied more than once, to alert the hiring manager that this applicant has already applied to a job …

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board that I am using to track new applicants for job postings. I want to create an update for applicants who applied more than once, to alert the hiring manager that this applicant has already applied to a job in the company in the past. What would be the best way to do this?
I would assume that to check if there is a duplicate would be to search for email address, and maybe name?
How would I do this?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Soroh,

You can do this using the Duplicates and Uniques app. Even better, you can search for duplicates automatically using templates.
Here is a demo of the app in action.

If you need any help with the app, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Soroh !

As @kolaai pointed out, this is indeed a great app for finding duplicates.

Alternatively, if you have the monday CRM product, this is a native feature.

You can learn more about that here.

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
